MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents Set Number One And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nelson Goodell, of The Goodell Law Firm, Tel. 415.495.3950, for plaintiffs and moving party;
Allan P. Nuttall, of Nation Home Financial, Inc., Tel. 650.994.8705, for defendants and opposing party;
No other appearances.

RULING: PLAINTIFF ALBERT HEINICKE Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents Set Number One And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted in part. Plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Off Calendar May-29-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
